title: Cataclysm Era
description: A post-apocalyptic mod that makes zombies extremely dangerous. Try your best to survive!
body:
**This is a mod focused on hardcore post-apocalyptic survival. Its core feature lies in adjusting zombie stats based on in-game time, without any modifications to zombie AI. It is recommended to play alongside other zombie-enhancing mods.
Key Features:**
- Displays the current in-game day count every morning.
- Zombies are no longer vulnerable to sunlight (only immune to sunburn, not fire damage).
- Zombies receive a power-up every 10 in-game days.
- Every 10th night becomes a special night event.
- Zombies have a chance to spawn with invisibility.
- In the mid-to-late game, zombies may spawn holding Totems of Undying.
- In the late game, zombies have a chance to spawn fully equipped with netherite armor.
- Zombies replace some of the vanilla game's monsters.
- Zombies drop a wider variety of items.

This mod offers high flexibility, with most adjustable values accessible in the configuration file.

**Compatibility Note:**
If you have the [Enhanced Celestials](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-celestials) mod installed, every 10th night will be set as a Super Moon.
